The '''beastwarden's shield''' was a defensive weapon from the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] martial arts form of [[Petranaki/Legends|Petranaki]].

The shield was made from a high strength [[Bronzium/Legends|bronzium]] disk that was very useful for defensive parries. However, the shield could also be used offensively; due to its serrated outer edge and light weight, many Geonosians threw the beastwarden's shield like a throwing disk, an action which often led to severe lacerations to their opponent.

{{Weapon-stub}}
